name: tree-sitter-language-pack
description: Parse and extract code intelligence from 300+ programming languages with tree-sitter — structure, imports, symbols, and syntax-aware chunking.

interface.shortDescription: Code intelligence for 300+ languages with tree-sitter
interface.longDescription: Parse source code and extract structure, imports, exports, symbols, docstrings, and comments from 306 programming languages using tree-sitter grammars. Produces syntax trees, language detection, syntax diagnostics, and syntax-aware chunking for LLM ingestion. Runs locally via the ts-pack CLI; SDKs ship for 10 languages plus WebAssembly. Plugin ships skills covering parsing, extraction, chunking, language detection, and parser-cache management.
defaultPrompt: Parse this file into a syntax tree
Extract the structure and imports from this source file
Chunk this file for an LLM context window
